title: Sweet and Flaky Syrian Pork Crumble
description: A weeknight-friendly Mediterranean dish featuring minced pork blended with sweet spices for a unique flavor profile.
instructions: Combine minced garlic and salt in a food processor.
Add chopped pomegranate seeds, sweet paprika, cumin seeds, and ground cumin to the mixture.
Grind until it forms a fine paste. Set aside.
Heat sesame oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add minced pork and cook until browned on all sides.
Add sweet spice paste and pomegranate molasses to the pan, stirring well to combine.
Reduce heat to low and let the mixture simmer for about 30 minutes or until it thickens slightly.
Serve warm as a side dish with your choice of bread.
